data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Search complete. Files to update identified: (1) plugins/dso/docs/adr/0001-outbound-jira-bridge.md — bridge script description needs LINK/UNLINK added to handled event types; (2) plugins/dso/docs/contracts/bridge-alert-event.md — needs link sync failure alert reasons in Purpose section and Emitters table; (3) plugins/dso/docs/contracts/revert-event.md — LINK/UNLINK bridge-outbound semantics section needs update. ticket-event-format.md and ticket-system-v3-architecture.md already include LINK/UNLINK in event type enums. ✓
